---
title: "00_env_init"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2026-03-12"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(pacman)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, janitor, reshape2, haven, qgcomp, qgcompint, ggh4x, mice)
```

```{r}
#folder locations
data <- "E:/BBK17/pj/basc_brief_analy/data/"
result<- "E:/BBK17/pj/basc_brief_analy/result/"
analy_dat<- "E:/BBK17/pj/basc_brief_analy/analy_dat/"
```
```
